system.description:
What it does (SRD): Scent lets the creature detect opponents by smell, usually out to about 30 ft. (strong scents farther, very weak scents closer). It can use scent to pinpoint a square once it is within 5 ft., and to track by Survival. Wind and water affect what it can smell.

ThirdEra: Scent (30 ft.) is set on this item’s Details tab under Capability grants (vision and senses), not in Mechanical effects. The character sheet includes it with other senses; Survival checks to track by scent still use the normal skill rules unless you add separate bonuses elsewhere.
